source.provenance: MadDM 3.2 relic run with the fully SARAH-consistent param card: mass matrix transcribed from the generated CalculateMFChi (off-diagonals -yh2 v/sqrt2, +yh1 v/sqrt2, -MPsi), negative-eigenvalue ZNMIX rows carried in IMZNMIX (row x i). Analytic h/Z chi1-chi1 couplings cross-checked against arXiv:2506.19062 Eq. 7 (c_h = -0.12223, exact match to Hellmann-Feynman dm_chi1/dv; c_Z magnitude to 0.4%). The sigma_SI blind spot with these cards sits at theta = -0.1523 with a MadDM-verified ~7-order dip, matching paper Eq. 8 exactly.
source.paper_note: The paper itself contains NO relic benchmark: Fig. 1 plots sigma_SI with points only color-coded by relic fraction, and there is no benchmark table or quoted Omega h^2 anywhere. The original central 0.292 entered the repo as a MadDM output-parser smoke-fixture number from an early /demo playtest, mis-cited to 'II Fig. 1' in the initial commit — the CITATION was fabricated, but the VALUE now agrees with the fully-consistent toolkit rerun (0.2916) to 0.1%, so the early demo run evidently used consistent cards.

history.why: smoke-fixture number with fabricated paper citation; value vindicated a posteriori by the consistent-card rerun
run with yh1 silently zeroed (MINPAR-vs-BSMPARAMS silent-zero bug)
correct couplings but real ZNMIX for the negative chi2 eigenvalue (missing Majorana phase i); corrupted chi2-exchange interference made chi1chi1->Zh spuriously dominant at 92%

Majorana phase fixed but the card still diagonalized the paper-convention all-plus mass matrix instead of SARAH's (-yh2, -MPsi signs); eigenvector column-2 signs wrong, biasing chi2/chi3 t-channel interference in the relic (sigma_SI is even in that sign and was already correct)

maddm_3_2_sarah_consistent.provenance: relic-dive 2026-07-06: full card-consistency ladder verified by A/B MadDM runs — 0.0717 (real ZNMIX) -> 0.2420 (chi2 row x i, paper-sign matrix) -> 0.2916 (chi2 row x i, SARAH-sign matrix). sigma_SI unchanged across the last step (chi1 vertices are even in the column-2 sign).

toolkit_measurements.blind_spot: sigma_SI blind spot at theta = -0.1523 (paper Eq. 8: m_chi1 + MPsi sin 2theta = 0; m_chi1 = +150.0 there, coincident with the |m_chi2|=|m_chi3| pseudo-Dirac crossing at 529.4): MadDM-verified dip to 3.4e-54 cm^2, ~7 orders below the benchmark plateau, bracketed by ~2.5e-49 shoulders at -0.165/-0.140. The historically-reported dip at theta = +0.79 (= pi/4, yh1 = yh2) was an artifact of diagonalizing the paper-sign matrix against SARAH-sign UFO vertices.
